plugins.name: archpillar-localization
plugins.description: Compile-time-extracted UI translation for .NET. Each string is written once at the call site as an in-code ICU MessageFormat default (also the runtime fallback, so the app works with zero translation files); a Roslyn generator extracts them for translators, and per-language catalogs load at runtime as overrides — an alternative to .resx / IStringLocalizer with no "missing resource" state and culture-correct plurals.

plugins.name: archpillar-mapper
plugins.description: Explicit, compile-checked object-to-object and DTO mapping for .NET. One mapper definition runs both as an in-memory mapper and as a LINQ/EF Core projection that translates to SQL — and unlike AutoMapper, every mapping is a named, navigable C# property while any unmapped property fails the build, so there is no hidden convention magic.
